evidence: The directory structure now reflects domain capabilities: src/app/ for core logic, src/ui.rs for presentation state, and src/gpu_renderer.rs for the rendering engine.
The extraction of background services into src/app/services.rs clearly defines the ownership of image prefetching and thumbnail generation.
The public API surface of the app module is well-defined in src/app/mod.rs.
high_level_elegance.issues_preventing_higher_score: The remaining root-level monolithic files (gpu_renderer.rs, image_backend.rs) prevent a perfect score as they mix concerns compared to the elegantly modularized app package.
